name: Audinate Group Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 67% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.5500, stop A$1.6929, target A$2.8200 (0.32:1) — then trail it.
